creator: jcfyecrayz@liamekaens.com
text:
Created attachment 234713
git diff for textproc/libxml++50

See https://libxmlplusplus.github.io/libxmlplusplus

The 5.0 ABI version is the latest flavor of libxml++.  Some ports call for a newer version of libxml++ (e.g., elinks-0.15.0 optionally depends on libxml++50 if using spidermonkey78).

QA:
 - portclippy (ok)
 - portlint (ok)
 - poudriere testport (ok)
